# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

# Global Plugin Configurations
plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      allowed_origins:
        - "https://example1.com"
        - "https://example2.com"
      allowed_methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      allowed_headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Auth-Token
  - name: authentication
    config:
      strategy: jwt
      # JWT secret key
      secret_key: mysecretkey
      # JWT token expiration time (in seconds)
      token_expiration: 3600
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      limit: 100
      window: 60
